meta.defaultTitle: INAYA Domestic Workers | UAE Maid & Domestic Worker Services
meta.defaultDescription: INAYA Domestic Workers is a trusted UAE maid and domestic worker services company providing maids, nannies, cooks, caregivers and home support across all UAE emirates. A premium choice for families searching for top domestic workers in the UAE.

hero.title: UAE's Trusted Maid & Domestic Worker Services
hero.subtitle: INAYA Domestic Workers is a premium choice for families looking for reliable maids, nannies, cooks and care staff across the UAE. Live-in, live-out, hourly and monthly domestic help.

about.title: About INAYA Domestic Workers
about.subtitle: Your trusted domestic services partner across the UAE
about.p1: INAYA Domestic Workers is a leading maid and domestic worker services provider based in Ajman and serving families across the UAE. We connect homes with trained, verified and reliable domestic staff.
about.p2: From live-in maids and nannies to cooks, elder care and recruitment services, we handle every detail including visa assistance, background verification and replacement support.
about.mission: To make hiring trusted domestic help simple, safe and affordable for families across the UAE.
about.vision: To be the UAE's most trusted domestic workers company, known for quality staff, honest service and premium family support.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about our UAE maid and domestic worker services
faq.q1: How do I book a maid service?
faq.a1: Simply fill the booking form or contact us. Our team will confirm availability and arrange the service.
faq.a2: Yes. Every worker goes through background verification and training before placement.
faq.q3: Do you offer a replacement guarantee?
faq.a3: Yes. If you are not satisfied, we provide a free replacement as per our policy.
faq.q4: Do you help with maid visa and sponsorship?
faq.a4: Yes. We provide full maid visa assistance and sponsorship transfer services.
faq.a5: We provide maid and domestic worker services across all UAE emirates, including Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah and Umm Al Quwain. Contact us to confirm availability for your requirement.
